
Hello we have a transaction that is failing due to the error tezos: kind=temporary, id=proto.017-PtNairob.gas_exhausted.operation both from the BCD UI and tzgo aswell. We have an entrypoint handle_relay_message on the ghostnet. Here is the link of the contract. https://better-call.dev/ghostnet/KT1HBboTBRxjcL3KAcYbN81rnsRkz8u1Wnao/interact/handle_relay_message The parameters are msg =  and prev = btp://0x7.icon/cxd2d1738cfa7c8b1278452637a66370e66e74af1b msg is bytes and prev is string While simulating on BCD, it shows that the transaction is passed but while simulating through tzgo it says gas exhausted operations. And the wallet address to call the operation is tz1dheF62PzopJviUxDBjUx6KfNwH7K5pqRE can you guys help us out here ?
